steps.description: Inspect the meal-planner repo profile, identify safe working roots, and confirm the shopping-list route as the bounded change surface.
Update frontend/src/routes/shopping-list/index.tsx so the empty state explains the dependency on meal plans and adds a route-level call to action.
Attach repo-native validation evidence using the canonical commands defined by the meal-planner repo profile.

success_criteria: The plan references real files and commands in meal-planner.
The execution stays inside allowed working roots.
Evaluation evidence maps repo-native validation into canonical platform records.
